PropertyInt.name: transmitUnit
PropertyInt.description: The value of the desired maximum transmit unit to be used for link control protocol.

PropertyInt.name: receiveUnit
PropertyInt.description: The value of the desired maximum receive unit to be used for link control protocol.

PropertyInt.name: configurationRetries
PropertyInt.description: The number of retries for configuration.

PropertyInt.name: terminationRetries
PropertyInt.description: The number of retires for termination.

PropertyInt.name: retryTimeout
PropertyInt.description: Value of time out in seconds for retry.

PropertyBoolean.name: useMagicNumber
PropertyBoolean.description: enable use of the magic number.

PropertyInt.name: lqmReceiveInterval
PropertyInt.description: Receive internval for link quality monitoring.

PropertyBoolean.name: ip
PropertyBoolean.description: Enable the ip network control protocol.

PropertyBoolean.name: ipv6
PropertyBoolean.description: Enable the ipv6 network control protocol.

PropertyString.name: localNegotiationMode
PropertyString.description: Mode to be used for local negotiation.

PropertyString.name: localIdType
PropertyString.description: Type of the local ID to negotiate.

PropertyString.name: localMACInterfaceId
PropertyString.description: Id of the local MAC interface

PropertyString.name: localIPv6InterfaceId
PropertyString.description: ID of the local Ipv6 interface.

PropertyString.name: peerMACInterfaceId
PropertyString.description: ID of the peer mac interface.

PropertyString.name: peerIPv6InterfaceId
PropertyString.description: Id of the peer IPV6 interface.

PropertyInt.name: transmitAlignment
PropertyInt.description: Value of the desired transmit alignment to be used for OSI.

PropertyInt.name: receiveAlignment
PropertyInt.description: Value of the desired receive alignment to be used for OSI.
